sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Slide
special_mechanics.description: Ability to slide across ground, debuted in Mega Man 3 and retained in Mega Man 4

special_mechanics.name: Charged Mega Buster
special_mechanics.description: New Mega Buster upgrade that allows charging shots by holding firing button for more powerful blast

special_mechanics.name: Rush Coil
special_mechanics.description: Rush transforms into Coil mode for navigating environments

special_mechanics.name: Rush Jet
special_mechanics.description: Rush transforms into Jet mode for navigating environments

special_mechanics.name: Rush Marine
special_mechanics.description: Rush transforms into Marine mode for navigating aquatic environments

special_mechanics.name: Wire Adaptor
special_mechanics.description: Hidden support item found in stages that aids reaching normally inaccessible areas

special_mechanics.name: Balloon Adaptor
special_mechanics.description: Hidden support item found in stages that aids reaching normally inaccessible areas

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Movement physics parameters not numerically documented in available sources. Game features standard Mega Man platforming with run/jump/climb/slide mechanics. Charged weapon system added meaningful gameplay depth. No sub-pixel precision data found in documentation.
